name: stray-skillops
description: Repo-local Codex plugin for skill authoring, review, evals, and subagent operations.

interface.shortDescription: Operate a healthy skill and subagent system: author, review, test, and coordinate.
interface.longDescription: A repo-local Codex plugin for skill and subagent operations. It helps agents create and refine SKILL.md files for either this plugin family or project-scoped `.agents/skills/` folders, search for existing patterns, review trigger quality, audit overlap, design validation strategy, create project subagents, design multi-agent workflows, add AI evals to CI, and compress long-running task context while maintaining this workflow set.
defaultPrompt: Find existing skills before creating a new one.
Create a new Codex skill in this plugin family.
Create or update a project-scoped Codex skill under .agents/skills/ without scaffolding a plugin.
Update an existing skill's trigger description, scope, or workflow.
Review a SKILL.md for trigger quality, overlap risk, and scope clarity.
Audit this plugin's skills for overlap, routing conflicts, or missing coverage.
Clean up a skill so it is narrower, instruction-first, and easier to invoke correctly.
Compare candidate skill patterns and decide whether to adopt, adapt, or create new.
Plan validation cases for a new or updated skill.
Compress a long-running task without losing file paths, decisions, or next steps.
Design a multi-agent workflow with clear handoffs and quality gates.
Add AI or agent evals to CI so regressions fail the build.
Create or update a custom Codex subagent under .codex/agents/ for a specific workflow.
